claim: The generated output is syntactically valid (valid JSON for graphspec, valid TypeScript for functions)
The output correctly implements all key behaviors specified in the task
All references (fn names, source names, imports) exist in the provided catalog/utilities
All dependencies/data flows are correctly declared (no missing deps, no unused inputs)
The LLM correctly identified that a bug exists in the provided code/spec
The LLM pointed to the correct component/node/function where the bug resides
The LLM's suggested fix would actually resolve the identified bug
